content:
Hello!
The description of the items gained for buying 13,000, 16000, 20,000 and 25,0000 silver prime on the spending rewards event "Gift of Knowledge" are currently wrong.

After the flavor text the tooltip states:
Use it to obtain 1 random Limited "`Ultra/Caro/Aequor/Chaos`" realm `Awakener/WoD`released during "Faded Legacy".

This is not correct. The items allow you to choose an Awakener or Wheel of Destiny, not randomly obtain one.

You could change it to something like:
Use it to choose 1 Limited "`Ultra/Caro/Aequor/Chaos`" realm `Awakener/WoD`released during "Faded Legacy".

The items affected are the following:
Ultra Mapping: Faded Legacy (13,000 reward)
Ultra Prophecy: Faded Legacy  (13,000 reward)
Caro Birth: Faded Legacy (16,000 reward)
Caro Whisper: Faded Legacy (16,000 reward)
Aequor Mystery: Faded Legacy (20,000 reward)
Aequor Codex: Faded Legacy (20,000 reward)
Chaos Echo: Faded Legacy (25,000 Reward)
Chaos Experiment: Faded Legacy (25,000 Reward)

I've attached images of the related items.
thread_title: ✅「Answered」Incorrect Description of Realm Specific Gift of Knowledge Reward Items
